meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve Scaling Issues
content.seo_description: Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit to overcome scaling bottlenecks. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to build faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. By leveraging a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you eliminate repetitive boilerplate, database schema setup, and authentication wiring. Combining this with AI-driven development via Antigravity and Claude Code allows you to ship production-ready SaaS applications in hours, not weeks, effectively solving your project scalability limitations.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. You have three clients waiting, a backlog of features, and the crushing realization that your current workflow is a trap. Every project starts with the same tedious setup—auth, database connectors, and UI scaffolding—stealing the hours you should be spending on high-value logic.

The industry graveyard is filled with freelancers who couldn't cross the chasm between 'coding' and 'shipping.' The secret isn't working harder; it's building a system that works for you. By adopting a hardened SaaS starter kit, you transform from a manual laborer into a high-velocity product architect, turning every new client project into a plug-and-play operation.

steps.title: Initialize the Starter Kit
steps.description: Select a robust SaaS starter kit that includes pre-configured authentication, billing, and database ORM. This creates your foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the high-performance SaaS starter kit template, including Supabase auth and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define Schema with AI
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate client requirements into a normalized database schema, ensuring scalability from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with roles for Admin, Manager, and User.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for multi-tenant saas'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD endpoints manually. Use AI to generate RESTful or tRPC routes based on your schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create tRPC routers for all entities defined in the schema to handle standard CRUD operations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create trpc routers for all schema models'

steps.title: Component-Driven UI Scaffolding
steps.description: Use component libraries to build interfaces rapidly, maintaining design consistency across client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout with sidebar navigation and data tables using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create dashboard shell with shadcn components'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Automate the CI/CD pipeline to ensure every push to production is tested and verified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, type-checking, and deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always use a 'feature flag' toggle in your starter kit so you can deploy incomplete features to production without exposing them to users.
Standardize your database naming conventions across all clients; it makes switching between projects mentally frictionless.
Treat your starter kit like a product; version control it separately and update it quarterly with new tech stack improvements.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your auth flows; it is the single best way to prevent support tickets after launch.
Pre-build a 'settings' page module that includes common client needs like team management and API key generation to save 5+ hours per project.
content.next_steps: Now that you have your foundation, identify one recurring task you perform in every project and create a custom CLI script to automate it.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for slow, manual builds. Take control of your workflow, scale your revenue, and ship like a senior engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
